column1: 1.Please feedback acknowledgement within 1 working day once you receive this sample order.请于收到订单后一个工作日内确认并反馈。2.Please check forwarder information with PO creator if incoterm with EXW,FOC,FCA,CIF.如果交付条款为EXW,FOC,FCA,CIF,出货前请与发订单人员确认货代信息。3.Please include << Samples checking report>>,<ID Card of Sample>,and sample order hard copywhen you arrange sample delivery. For external suppliers,please attach AS244 label and Delivery Note forgoods receiving in system.请在出货时附上《样件检测报告》,《样件标识卡》和样件订单复印件。对于外部供应商,请一并附上AS244和ASN以便系统收货。4.Please deliver goods to warehouse receiver. Goods receiving and payment will not be done if delivered toother person.请出货给仓库收货人员。如果交货给其他人,系统收货和付款将不会被处理。5.For overseas business,all of the wooden pallet must be fumigated,and contain very clear IPPC SYMBOLon the pallet otherwise the supplier is responsibility of the punished for no IPPC issue.对于海外业务,所有的木质托盘必须经过熏蒸且带有清晰的IPPC标识,否则供应商有义务承担由此产生的相应罚金。6.For overseas business,please include sample order,invoice,packaging list and COO (Country of Origin)certification in your shipping documents.对于海外业务,出货文件中请包含样件订单,发票,包装和原产国证明。7.For domestic suppliers,if ETA is on 1st-19th,please download goods receiving record from LIS andcreate invoice in the same month. If ETA is on 20th-31st,please download goods receiving record fromLIS and create invoice next month. Goods receiving record updated date in LIS is on 20th-22nd of every month.The PO will be closed in ALV system and can't be paid if not meet the requirement.对于国内业务,到货日在1日-19日,请确保当月从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。到货日在20日到31日的,请确保次月之内从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。对账日为每月的20日到22日。如不及时处理,系统内将关闭此订单,付款将不能被处理。

Goods receiving and payment will not be done if delivered toother person.请出货给仓库收货人员。如果交货给其他人,系统收货和付款将不会被处理。5.For overseas business,all of the wooden pallet must be fumigated,and contain very clear IPPC SYMBOLon the pallet otherwise the supplier is responsibility of the punished for no IPPC issue.对于海外业务,所有的木质托盘必须经过熏蒸且带有清晰的IPPC标识,否则供应商有义务承担由此产生的相应罚金。6.For overseas business,please include sample order,invoice,packaging list and COO (Country of Origin)certification in your shipping documents.对于海外业务,出货文件中请包含样件订单,发票,包装和原产国证明。7.For domestic suppliers,if ETA is on 1st-19th,please download goods receiving record from LIS andcreate invoice in the same month. If ETA is on 20th-31st,please download goods receiving record fromLIS and create invoice next month. Goods receiving record updated date in LIS is on 20th-22nd of every month.The PO will be closed in ALV system and can't be paid if not meet the requirement.对于国内业务,到货日在1日-19日,请确保当月从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。到货日在20日到31日的,请确保次月之内从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。对账日为每月的20日到22日。如不及时处理,系统内将关闭此订单,付款将不能被处理。

Goods receiving and payment will not be done if delivered toother person.请出货给仓库收货人员。如果交货给其他人,系统收货和付款将不会被处理。5.For overseas business,all of the wooden pallet must be fumigated,and contain very clear IPPC SYMBOLon the pallet otherwise the supplier is responsibility of the punished for no IPPC issue.对于海外业务,所有的木质托盘必须经过熏蒸且带有清晰的IPPC标识,否则供应商有义务承担由此产生的相应罚金。6.For overseas business,please include sample order,invoice,packaging list and COO (Country of Origin)certification in your shipping documents.对于海外业务,出货文件中请包含样件订单,发票,包装和原产国证明。7.For domestic suppliers,if ETA is on 1st-19th,please download goods receiving record from LIS andcreate invoice in the same month. If ETA is on 20th-31st,please download goods receiving record fromLIS and create invoice next month. Goods receiving record updated date in LIS is on 20th-22nd of every month.The PO will be closed in ALV system and can't be paid if not meet the requirement.对于国内业务,到货日在1日-19日,请确保当月从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。到货日在20日到31日的,请确保次月之内从LIS系统下载对账单并开据发票。对账日为每月的20日到22日。如不及时处理,系统内将关闭此订单,付款将不能被处理。
